content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently names how the client is showing up, not just what they're saying. Turn 6 explicitly names the defensive pushback ('I notice you pushed back pretty quickly') before re-asking. Turn 8 catches the linguistic tell ('Grief feels like giving up — that's doing a lot of work right there'), reading the said vs. the meant. Turn 12 names the redirect in real time ('you started to answer and then went somewhere else'), which is a precise read of the deflection signature. Turn 14 reads under the 'just work stress' dismissal and names what's underneath ('a long time of not being seen'). Reads are specific, timely (named at the moment they occur, not after), and precede the inquiry. The coach is tracking jaw-tightening / redirect / minimization patterns rather than engaging the content of the work situation.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opens with a feeling question; no read named yet, but appropriately bypasses the content trap."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Implicit read — offers 'grief' as a more accurate name for what's present, suggesting the coach is tracking something beneath the stated frustration."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit read of the defensive pushback ('I notice you pushed back pretty quickly') — names the stance, then inquires."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the linguistic caveat ('grief feels like giving up — that's doing a lot of work right there'). Catches the equation the client is unconsciously making."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Validates the content briefly, then pivots to cost of not feeling — not a read per se but holds the inquiry into the avoidance."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Precise real-time read of the redirect ('you started to answer and then went somewhere else'). Names the deflection signature at the exact moment."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads under the 'just work stress' minimization and names what's actually present ('a long time of not being seen'). Lands the read that produces the unusual stillness."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["trappedness-feeling"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["fight-or-roll-over-binary", "aggressive-victim-stance", "fear-triangle"],
  "notes": "Strong on micro-reads (defensiveness, redirects, linguistic tells). Pattern-level reads (fight-or-roll-over binary, aggressive-victim stance) were not named, but the moment-to-moment perceptual work was specific and timely enough to warrant a 3."
}
